game_info.title: Go Escape - P5.js
game_info.concept:
Go Escape is a wickedly addictive mobile game that amps up the classic ball game vibe with a killer twist. You're not just rolling a ball here: you're mastering the art of precision and strategy. The whole game is a mind-bending journey of making that epic ball jump, bounce, and dodge its way from one rad platform to the next, with each level cranking up the heat.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/go-escape-casual-ball-games/id1435951901

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Go Escape is a wickedly addictive mobile game that amps up the classic ball game vibe with a killer twist. You're not just rolling a ball here: you're mastering the art of precision and strategy. The whole game is a mind-bending journey of making that epic ball jump, bounce, and dodge its way from one rad platform to the next, with each level cranking up the heat.

The star of the show? It's a ball that's not just any old sphere. This thing is sleek, responsive, and handles like a dream. Thanks to the game's top-notch physics engine, it's all about that tactile feel, where every bounce and leap off a platform feels exceptionally real.

Levels in the game are like a boss rush of brain teasers. You've got one shot, one path to victory, and it's littered with obstacles that'll test your reflexes. These aren't your garden-variety hurdles either. We're talking devious blocks and tricky movers that'll have you plotting your moves like a grandmaster.

Platforms are the game's backbone – they come in all shapes and sizes, from rock-steady to those sneaky vanishing ones. It isn't just a test of skill: it's also a visual feast with eye-popping colors that'll keep your eyeballs glued to the screen.

As you level up, the game throws down the gauntlet with even crazier challenges. It's a perfect blend of skill, strategy, and speed. You have to stay sharp, think fast, and adapt. And the satisfaction of nailing that perfect run? Unbeatable.

Controls in this ball jumping game are slick and intuitive. You won't be fumbling around: it's all smooth sailing so that you can focus on the action. What about audio? The game's tunes and sound effects are on point, keeping you pumped as you blaze through the levels.

In a nutshell, Go Escape is a beast of a ball game. It's packed with mind-blowing levels, heart-pounding challenges, and straight-up eye candy visuals. This game is your next obsession if you're all about that high-octane, brain-twisting, platform-hopping action. Get ready to bounce your way to glory!
game_info.description: Go Escape is a high-octane physics platformer where you control a high-tech sphere navigating through a dangerous neon-lit obstacle course. Your objective is to roll, jump, and bounce your way to the exit portal at the end of the level. Collect Neon Orbs for score, avoid the red "Data Spikes" which destroy you instantly, and navigate across moving, vanishing, and bouncy platforms. Use momentum to your advantage and master the physics to survive.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Arrow Right: Roll the ball (apply torque/force)
- Space: Jump (can double jump in air)
- Shift: Brake / Stabilize (stops rotation)
- Z: Boost (consume energy for a burst of speed)
- Enter: Start Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over or Pause)
- Esc: Pause / Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Physics and Movement Sanity Check. Verifies that the ball responds to gravity and basic inputs without glitching through the floor.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot simply holds the Right Arrow key to accelerate and presses Space periodically to jump. It checks if position changes and if the ball stays within valid Y bounds.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The ball should move to the right and jump. The test is considered successful if the ball covers a certain distance without the game crashing or the ball falling out of the world bounds immediately.

TEST_2.test_description: Obstacle Avoidance and Level Completion. Tests the game's solvability and collision resolution logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot uses a "sensor" look-ahead approach. It scans the entities array for obstacles (Spikes, Pits) in front of the player. If an obstacle is detected within a threshold distance, it triggers a Jump. It constantly moves Right.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The ball should successfully navigate over the first few obstacles. The test is successful if the player reaches a specific x-coordinate (e.g., 1000px) or reaches the goal state.

TEST_3.test_description: Platform Interaction Test. Verifies collision with different platform types (Bouncy, Moving).
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot navigates to a known bouncy platform section and stops horizontal movement to let gravity do the work, observing the bounce height.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The vertical velocity should invert and increase upon contact with bouncy surfaces. The player should remain alive.
